author: Sleeper
content:
OK. That’s just retarded. If ppl can’t understand the fundamental design goals of different messaging system, it’s their problem. Not yours. A.k.a. RTFM.

Just because they are different doesn’t mean they shouldn’t be consisted. It shows how much they are trading off for their respective feature.

Just like how the internet can be full of crap, so can the comments and criticisms. You doing a great job.
